steps.description: DO NOT record the login screen — webreel has no cookie/storage-state, so we'd be typing credentials on camera. Instead: capture ArgoCD as a screenshot of the already-logged-in app view in the editor, OR run this config against an authenticated ArgoCD URL with a temporary password and CUT the login segment in post. See RECORDING_SCRIPT.md §ArgoCD.
Assumes you're already logged in OR ArgoCD has been temporarily unauthenticated for the recording (kubectl patch argocd-cmd-params-cm server.disable.auth=true, then revert).

steps.label: inference-api • Synced • Healthy
steps.description: GitOps chain receipt: ArgoCD has reconciled and the live cluster matches git.
Scroll down to where the deployment's pod-template annotations are visible.

steps.label: mlops/classifier-version
steps.description: ID-MATCHING MOTIF — this annotation value is the same MLflow registered-model version that won earlier. Bumping this is what triggered the rolling restart.
